title: sida incerta
intro: Sida incerta, also known as the uncertain mallow, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family Malvaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Sida incerta include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to reduce inflammation and combat infections. In herbal preparations, Sida incerta is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
